entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00086) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MOD P00086 IS (A) TO TRANSFER 2 GFE TEST DEVICES FROM PM UH TO THIS SERVICE CONTRACT FOR A SHORT TERM LOAN TO CSC; AND (B) TO REVISE ATTACHMENT 44, PWS FOR CGBS AS MUTUALLY AGREED.

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00087) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS ADMINISTRATIVE MOD IS TO DEFINITIZE TASK ORDER BF04, ADD FAR CLAUSE 52.204-10, AND REVISE ATTACHMENT 29B.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00088) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS UNILATERAL MODIFICATION P00088 SERVES AS THE UNPRICED CHANGE ORDER (UCO) FOR THE FSXXI ADDITIONAL CH-47 SIMULATION TRAINING SERVICES. THE NTE AMOUNT IS SET AT $12M. THE POP FOR THE UCO IS 12 MONTHS ACA WITH THE DEFINITIZATIOND ATE SET AS 180 BUSINESS DAYS ACA. PR# 0010414114.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00089) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MOD P00089 IS TO INCORPORATE CHANGES MADE TO THE UCO FOR ADDITIONAL CH-47F ISSUED IN MOD P00088. NO PR IS NEEDED. THE MOD WAS MADE BILATERAL SO THAT THE KTR CAN ACKOWLEDGE THESE CHANGES TO THE UCO.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00090) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MOD P00090 IS (A) TO INCORPORATE THE AT OPSEC INTO THE BASIC CONTRACT; (B) TO INCORPORATE EXHIBIT E-37, DA FOR UH-60M BLK II OFP FILES; AND (C) TO REVISE ATTACHMENT 1 APPENDIX A, TECH PROP FOR TH-1H. PR#0010414024

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00091) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION (MOD) P00091 IS (A) TO RE-NUMBER ATTACHMENT 49, DD1149 FOR 2 GFP MULTI-FUNCTION DEVICES (MFDS) AS EXHIBIT H.3A; (B) TO INCORPORATE EXHIBITS H.4A AND H.4B, DD1149S FOR 6 NIGHT VISION GOGGLES (NVGS), TO REFLECT THE RETURN OF THESE 6 NVGS FROM THE CONTRACTOR TO FT RUCKER DISPOSITION OFFICE; (C) TO INCORPORATE EXHIBITS H.5A AND H.5B, DD1149S FOR 2 REMOTE CONTROL UNITS (RCUS), TO REFLECT THE RETURN OF THESE 2 RCUS FROM THE CONTRACTOR TO PEO AVIATION; (D) TO INCORPORATE EXHIBIT H.6A, DD2062 FOR AMP COMPUTERS, TO REFLECT THE TRANSFER THE APM COMPUTERS TO CSC; (E) TO UPDATE THE PCO'S INFORMATION IN SECTIONS A, G.6 AND H.2 ; (F) TO UPDATE THE CONTRACT DOCUMENTS MENTIONED IN SECTION C.1 TO THE CURRENT VERSIONS FOR ADMINISTRATIVE PURPOSE; AND (G) TO UPDATE EXHIBIT B WITH REVISION 1 AS MUTUALLY AGREED. NO PR REQUIRED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00092) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MOD IS TO (A) REVISE EXHIBIT B, UH-60M PBP SCHEDULE, BY REV 2; AND (B) UPDATE ATTACHMENT 4, DD254, BY REV 6. NO PR IS NEEDED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00093) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION (MOD) P00093 IS (A) TO EXERCISE THE OPTION YEAR 11, LOT XII; (B) TO INCORPORATE EXHIBIT E-38, DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT FOR AVCATT DOCUMENTS ; (C) TO INCORPORATE EXHIBIT E-39, DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT FOR UH-60M INTEGRATED VEHICLE HEALTH MONITORING SYSTEM (IVHMS) MULTIUSER DATABASE (MUD) FILES; (D) TO INCORPORATE ATTACHMENT 29C, TERMS AND CONDITIONS FOR ACCEPTANCE OF UH-60M OFTS IN SECTION J; (E) TO UPDATE THE WIDE AREA WORKFLOW (WAWF) AND CONTRACTING OFFICER REPRESENTATIVE (COR) INFORMATION IN SECTIONS F AND G; AND (F) TO UPDATE ATTACHMENT 5, DOL WAGE DETERMINATION, WITH REVISION 13 IN SECTION J. PR#0010471424

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES
